name: Rocky Road Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the butter or margarine in a large mixing bowl with an electric mixer on medium to high speed for 30 seconds.
2. Add brown sugar and beat until combined.
3. Beat in egg yolk and vanilla until combined.
4. Beat in as much of the flour as you can using the mixer.
5. Stir any remaining flour with a wooden spoon.
6. Spread the dough in a lightly greased 12-inch pizza pan.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for about 25 minutes, or until golden.
8. Sprinkle hot crust with 1 cup of chocolate pieces. Let stand 1 to 2 minutes to soften.
9. Spread chocolate over the crust.
10. Sprinkle with marshmallows and nuts.
11. Bake for an additional 3 minutes, or until marshmallows are puffed.
12. Cool in the pan on a wire rack.
13. Melt the remaining chocolate pieces and shortening in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
14. Drizzle over the cooled pizza.
15. Cut into wedges. Makes 12 to 16 servings.
